title: PJM Operational Reserves JSON API
description:
This dataset contains operating reserve values in MWs in PJM for the entire
RTO and Mid-Atlantic/Dominion region and is updated every 15 seconds.

Values are included for the Primary Reserve Requirement, Total, and
Requirement from Markets; the Synchronized Reserve Requirement, Total,
and Requirement from Markets; and the 30-Minute Total and Requirement
from Markets.

⚠️ PJM does not typically backfill this data series in the event of data drops.
